rooms.title: LA Trip
rooms.marblePrompt: A small, sunlit room with a big window looking out to the city skyline, sandy-warm light, a folded map on the desk. The walls are painted a soft beige, with a few framed photos of iconic LA landmarks. A small, wooden chest in the corner holds souvenirs.
rooms.rationale: This room is designed to evoke the feeling of a LA trip, with a focus on the city's iconic landmarks and sunny weather.

memories.label: LA Photo
memories.note: A picture from the LA trip
memories.rationale: Placed on the desk, where the morning light would highlight the photo's vibrant colors
memories.objectPrompt: a framed photo of a city skyline

rooms.title: Grandma's Kitchen
rooms.marblePrompt: A cozy, warm kitchen with a big window looking out to a garden, soft natural light, a wooden table with a few family photos. The walls are painted a warm yellow, with a few antique utensils on the shelves.
rooms.rationale: This room is designed to evoke the feeling of a warm and cozy family kitchen, with a focus on the grandmother's presence.

memories.label: Grandma's Kitchen Photo
memories.rationale: Placed on the wooden table, where the soft light would bring out the photo's warm colors
memories.objectPrompt: a framed photo of a kitchen
